channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit is a rising star in the electronic scene, known for his energetic performances and innovative sound.

item.title: Journey @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-29 03:30 — Journey at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is known for his powerful vocals and dynamic stage presence, appealing to a broad audience.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 → 2026-12-08 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is gaining traction in the pop scene with her heartfelt lyrics and engaging live performances.

item.title: Bryson Tiller @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-10-28 02:30 — Bryson Tiller at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Bryson Tiller's unique blend of R&B and hip-hop has garnered him a loyal following, ensuring an exciting live show.

item.title: Fetty Wap @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-12-04 04:00 — Fetty Wap at The Masonic. Fetty Wap's nostalgic appeal and energetic performances make his shows a fun experience for fans.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. KATSEYE is an emerging act with a unique sound, promising an engaging live performance.

item.title: Nothing But Thieves @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2027-04-04 03:00 — Nothing But Thieves at Fox Theater - Oakland. Nothing But Thieves are known for their captivating live shows and strong fan engagement.

item.title: SiM @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-10-16 03:00 — SiM at August Hall. SiM's energetic performances and dedicated fanbase make their shows a thrilling experience.

item.title: The Smashing Pumpkins @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-09 04:00 — The Smashing Pumpkins at SAP Center at San Jose. The Smashing Pumpkins continue to draw crowds with their legacy and nostalgic appeal.

item.title: Sara Bareilles @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-17 03:00 — Sara Bareilles at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. EPIK HIGH is a prominent act in the hip-hop scene, known for their engaging live shows.

item.title: Rise Against @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-23 02:00 — Rise Against at The Masonic. Rise Against's passionate performances and dedicated fanbase make their shows a must-see.

item.title: they are gutting a body of water @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-11-13 04:00 — they are gutting a body of water at August Hall. they are gutting a body of water is an intriguing act with a unique sound, promising an interesting live experience.

item.title: Blondshell @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-10-18 03:00 — Blondshell at The Castro Theatre. Blondshell is gaining attention for her unique sound and engaging live performances.

item.title: The Chicks @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-10-30 03:30 — The Chicks at The Masonic. The Chicks are a well-known act with a strong following, ensuring a memorable live performance.
